name: PSI readability
description: Returns `OK` if /proc/pressure/{cpu,memory,io} are readable, `WARNING` if PSI is not enabled in the kernel (kernel < 4.20 or the psi=1 boot parameter is not set), and `CRITICAL` if the agent does not have permission to read the files.

name: Cgroup PSI readability
description: Emitted only when `cgroup_roots` is configured. Returns `OK` if the configured cgroupfs path exists and is a cgroup v2 hierarchy, `WARNING` if the cgroupfs path is missing or the host is on cgroup v1 (which does not expose PSI).
